transcript: Oh, sit with me. I bet I can get you a golden egg though. You don't feel bad, do you Doc? Oh, it's my tummy, Doc. It hurts. Don't worry, Mr. Doc. You'll be fine. I think a deer got my legs. But still, you're a dummy. You don't have any. Oh. Oh. Yeah.

timestamps.text: I bet I can get you a golden egg though.
You don't feel bad, do you Doc?
Oh, it's my tummy, Doc. It hurts.
Don't worry, Mr. Doc. You'll be fine.
I think a deer got my legs.
But still, you're a dummy. You don't have any.
